en: Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh
Chemistry was crazy from the get-go
Neither one of us knew why
We didn't build nothing overnight
ko: 우리는 하룻밤 사이에 아무것도 만들지 않았어

en: Cause a love like this takes some time
People swore it off as a phase
Said we can't see that
ko: 우리가 그걸 볼 수 없다고 했지

en: Now from top to bottom
They see that we did that
It's so true that We've been through it
But we got right
See baby, we've been too strong for too long
ko: 봐, 아기야, 우리는 너무 오랫동안 강했어

en: And I can't be without you, baby
And I'll be waiting up until you get home
Cause I can't sleep without you, baby
ko: 너 없이는 잠도 못 자, 아기야

en: Anybody who's ever loved, you know just what I feel
ko: 사랑해본 사람은 내가 느끼는 걸 알지

en: Too hard to fake it
Nothing can replace it Call the radio
ko: 아무것도 대체할 수 없어, 라디오에 전화해

en: If you just can't be without you, baby
I got a question for ya
We already know the answer
